title: Beehiiv vs MailerLite (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and MailerLite: pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your needs best.
intro: Both Beehiiv and MailerLite are popular freemium email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter publishers seeking monetization and growth tools, while MailerLite targets small businesses and freelancers looking for affordable, feature-rich email campaigns. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right platform for your specific needs.
choose_a_if: You operate a newsletter publication and want to monetize through ads and sponsorships
You need built-in audience segmentation and advanced analytics for publisher metrics
You're willing to invest in premium features designed specifically for content creators
choose_b_if: You're a small business or freelancer with a tight budget starting at just $9/month
You need landing pages, pop-ups, and e-commerce integrations in one platform
You prefer an intuitive drag-and-drop editor and don't need monetization features

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your use case. Beehiiv excels for newsletter publishers wanting monetization and growth features. MailerLite is superior for small businesses needing affordable, all-in-one email marketing with landing pages and e-commerce tools. Choose based on your primary needs and budget.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or MailerLite?
faq.a: MailerLite is significantly cheaper, starting at $9/month compared to Beehiiv's $39/month. MailerLite's free tier also supports 1,000 subscribers, while Beehiiv allows 2,500. For budget-conscious businesses, MailerLite offers better value at entry-level pricing.

faq.q: Can I switch from MailerLite to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support subscriber list exports and imports, making migration possible. However, you'll lose MailerLite-specific features like landing pages and pop-ups in the transfer. Plan your transition carefully and test in Beehiiv's free tier before committing to paid plans.
